title: Customer with Extra Fields
description: Insert a new customer named "Riley Chen" with a "referredBy" field set to "Alice Johnson". This field doesn't exist on other customers.
concept: MongoDB has a flexible schema - documents in the same collection don't need identical fields. You can add new fields to any document without modifying the collection structure.
hint: Just add the referredBy field: db.customers.insertOne({name: "Riley Chen", email: "riley@example.com", referredBy: "Alice Johnson"})
